tests.name: complete local quality gate
tests.summary: Module verification, vet, unit tests, race tests, reproducible linux/amd64 and linux/arm64 builds, daemon, MCP and worker smoke tests, 45 Python tests, and repository validation passed.

tests.name: exact final public implementation workflow
tests.summary: The exact public implementation passed repository quality, PostgreSQL durability, and the complete observability stack rehearsal on a clean Linux Docker host.

tests.name: complete PostgreSQL integration and rollback suite
coverage: real Git publication and crash recovery
approved real-worker execution and same-delivery retry authorization
Sprint 05 schema rollback rehearsal against the Sprint 04 binary
durable process restart and canonical-state preservation

tests.name: observability behavior and trust-boundary suites
coverage: connected HTTP, MCP, scheduler, worker, validation, delivery, and PostgreSQL traces
trace continuity through cancellation-detached cleanup and recovery
bounded traceparent-only ingress without tracestate or baggage
stable failure taxonomy and closed metric labels
secret-fixture exclusion from span, metric, log, dashboard, and alert content
serialized metric gathering and bounded operational queries
persistent Alloy positions and isolated Compose teardown

tests.name: Sprint 05 rollback target rehearsal
tests.summary: The authoritative Sprint 05 close commit built every command, passed the kernel smoke test, and retained all six PostgreSQL migration versions.
